overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial gym and training facility. The character walks past exercise equipment, water coolers, and a prominent RANGE sign before approaching an exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corner of industrial training facility

events.description: moving from enclosed corner into open gym training area

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the facility corner, passing exercise equipment and water coolers

entered.detail: tall white water dispenser with blue bottle on top
large blue stability ball on the floor
large wooden cable spool with metal flanges
industrial metal rack with various items

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corner of an industrial training facility. The character moves past a water cooler and blue exercise ball, transitioning from the enclosed corner into a more open gym area with metal shelving and industrial fans visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: main training floor with shooting range

events.description: passing underneath large hanging RANGE sign

agents.ego_description: walking through the main training area, observing the range equipment and weight benches

entered.detail: large industrial banner with RANGE text hanging from ceiling
tall blue heavy punching bag suspended from ceiling
metal weight training bench with barbell
multiple flat screen displays mounted on the back wall
doorway with green exit light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the main training floor beneath a prominent RANGE sign. The space opens up to reveal weight benches, a punching bag, and wall-mounted monitors. The exit doorway becomes visible in the distance as the character progresses across the concrete floor.

events.description: approaching the exit doorway with green indicator light

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit doorway, preparing to leave the training facility

entered.detail: metal door frame with green exit light above

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the exit doorway on the right side of the training facility. The RANGE sign and exercise equipment fall behind as the doorway with its green indicator light becomes the focal point. The character approaches the threshold to exit the gym area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial gym that transitions from a cramped corner into an open training floor and finally toward an exit. It begins in a narrow section of the facility, moving past a water cooler and a blue exercise ball as the space opens up to reveal metal shelving and industrial fans. As the character progresses across the concrete floor, the scene expands into the main training area beneath a prominent RANGE sign, passing weight benches, a punching bag, and wall-mounted monitors. The camera then shifts its focus toward the right side of the room, leaving the exercise equipment behind as a doorway with a green indicator light comes into view. Finally, the movement culminates as the character approaches the threshold to exit the gym area.
